creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #1)

Since it is just a "notice" (it is not reported as an error) you would not need to worry about it. But of course, if this could/should be improved, feel free to open a pr, preferably with a proposal.

Regarding the port: stage-qa notices that there are no arch dependent files in the package. For the next submission, you could check whether NO_ARCH=yes is appropriate.
